user.title: Connect to Napoleon Home
user.description: Enter your Napoleon app account credentials to connect your Napoleon Home account. The grill must be registered in the Napoleon app.{name}

data_description.mac_address: Bluetooth MAC address of the grill (e.g. AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF). Leave blank if the grill was discovered automatically.

pick_device.title: Select grill
pick_device.description: Multiple Napoleon Prestige grills were found in your account. Select the one to configure.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Napoleon Home
reauth_confirm.description: The local key for {name} needs to be refreshed. Enter your Napoleon app account credentials.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Napoleon app email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Napoleon cloud. Check your internet connection.
error.no_devices_found: No Napoleon Prestige grills found in your account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Napoleon Home grill is already configured.
abort.device_added_to_account: The Napoleon Home grill has been added to your existing account.

user.title: Add Napoleon Home grill
user.description: Enter your Napoleon app account password and the Bluetooth MAC address of the grill to add.

data_description.mac_address: Bluetooth MAC address of the grill (e.g. AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF).

pick_device.title: Select grill
pick_device.description: Multiple Napoleon Prestige grills were found. Select the one matching the MAC address you entered.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Napoleon app email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Napoleon cloud. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Napoleon Home grill is already configured.
abort.no_devices_found: No unconfigured Napoleon Prestige grills found in your account.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to request a full property update from the grill while connected.

update_failed.message: Failed to poll properties from the Napoleon Home grill.
